source: HE DEFENDED THE LAND FROM#THE NEFARIOUS SORCERER, #{150}HUMGRUMP
target: JOTEK BERE LURRA DEFENDATZEN ZUEN#{150}PETRALTZAR#{100}AZTI MALTZURRARENGANDIK

source: JOT LIVED IN #{140}THE LAND OF MOJO #- A LAND OF {140}CREATIVITY
MOJO WAS #RULED BY THE GENTLE #{140}QUEEN CHROMA
FROM AFAR, HE COULD HEAR SOME #{150} RATHER EXCITING MUSIC...
THESE TALES WERE #{140}AVIDLY READ{100} #BY ALL THE PEOPLE #OF THE LAND...
AND WOULD #TRANSCRIBE HIS #MANY ADVENTURES #{140}IN BOOK FORM.
JOT REALLY FELT LIKE INVESTIGATING THAT MUSIC...
target: JOTEK MUSIKA HORI IKERTZEKO SEKULAKO BEHARRA SENTITU ZUEN

source: {120}ARE YOU HEARING THIS LAD?! @{120}I RECKON IT COULD BE A SCOOTCH LOUDER!.. @{120}ALL ABOARD THE MOONBEARD EXPRESS! @{120}DESTINATION... {150}DANCE CITY!
column4: MUTIKO?! @{120}PIXKA BAT ALTUXEAGO EGON DAITEKEELA USTE DUT!.. @{120}IGO GUZTIOK BIZARGI EXPRESSERA! @{120}HELMUGA... {150}DANTZA HIRIA!

source: A MINI QUEST, WOOO-HAAA! YOU TAKE CARE OF THE GOBLINS, AND I'LL HAUL THE WAX BACK HERE FOR YA! @.... @OH YEAH, THERE'LL BE GOBLINS... @NO SWEAT FOR YOU THOUGH, RIGHT JOT?
target: MINI-ABENTURA BAT, UOOO-JAAA! ZU ARDURATU IRATXOEZ, ETA NIK EKARRIKO DUT ARGIZARIA ZURETZAT! @.... @OH BAI, IRATXOAK EGONGO DIRA... @LAN ERRAZA ZURETZAT, EZTA JOT?

source: THE ENTRANCE TO THE WOODS BECKONED...
“I'M ON A ROLL HERE! TRAVELLING TO NEW MUSICAL REALMS!
target: “TOPERA NABIL HEMEN! MUSIKA ERRESUMA BERRIETARA BIDAIATZEN!

source: SINCE YOU'RE HERE, LAD, I HAVE A SMALL FAVOUR TO ASK..."
target: HEMEN ZAUDENEZ, LAGUN, MESEDETXO BAT ESKATUTKO DIZUT..."

source: THIS WAS THE HOUSE OF#{150}THE GOOD WIZARD MOONBEARD,#JOT'S CLOSE FRIEND AND {134}MENTOR.
target: #{150}BIZARGI AZTI ZINTZOAREN {100}ETXEA ZEN,#JOTEN LAGUN MINA ETA BERE {134}AHOLKULARIA.

source: “WOULD YOU GO TO#{150}HONEY PEAK{100}#AND GET SOME WAX FROM#{150}BENNY BEE?"{100}
target: “{150}EZTI TONTOR{100}ERA JOAN#ETA ESKATUKO DIOZU EZTIA#{150}BENNY ERLEARI?"{100}

source: JOT, THAT'S NOT THE WAY TO HONEY PEAK!
target: JOT, HORI EZ DA EZTI TONTORRERAKO BIDEA!

source: THE GATE SWUNG OPEN FOR THE PLUCKY SQUIRE
target: ATEA BAPATEAN IREKI ZEN EZKUTARI AUSARTARENTZAT

source: THE PLUCKY SQUIRE LEAPT NIMBLY ONWARDS!
target: EZKUTARI AUSARTAK BIZKORKI EGIN ZUEN AURRERA!

source: AHH... THE TOP OF HONEY PEAK... #THE VIEW IS INCREDIBLE! @...
target: AHH... EZTI TONTORREKO GAILURRA... #BISTA ZORAGARRIA DA! @...

source: NOW THAT RIGHT THERE IS A MASSIVE OWL. @THAT'S TOME TOWER, THAT IS!
target: HORTXE IKUS DAITEKE HONTZ ERRALDOI BAT. @HORI DA LIBURUKI DORREA!

source: WHOAH! THAT'S A HONEY BADGER! EATING BENNY BEE'S HONEY! @BE ON YOUR TOES, JOT... A HUNGRY HONEY BADGER CAN BE REALLY CRANKY...
target: UAUU! EZTI AZKONARRA DA! BENNY ERLEAREN EZTIA JATEN ARI DA! @KASU EMAN, JOT... GOSEAK DAGOEN AZKONARRA OSO ERRETXINA IZAN DAITEKE...

source: FOR SURE, PIP, MY MAN, I OWE YOU GUYS. HERE YOU GO.
target: ZIUR, PIP, GIZON, ZOR DIZUET. HEMEN DUZUE.

source: AHH... BACK IN THE HIVE. FEELS GOOD. @YO MANY THANKS, JOT - YOU DID ME A SOLID. THAT HONEY BADGER WAS REALLY MESSING WITH MY BEESWAX. @ANYHOW GANG, WHAT BRINGS YOU HERE?
target: AHH... BERRIZ ERE BERASKAN. ZEINEN ONGI. @HI, MILESKER, JOT - FABORE EDERRA EGIN DIDAK. EZTI AZKONAR HORREK GOGOZ NAHI ZIAN NIRE ARGIZARIA. @EDONOLA, BIKOTE, NOLATAN ZUEK HEMEN?

source: MOONBEARD SENT US, BENNY! HE COULD REALLY DO WITH SOME OF THAT BEESWAX, IF YOU HAVE SOME SPARE!
target: BIZARGIK BIDALI GAITIK, BENNY! HIRE ARGIZARI HORREN BEHARRA OMEN DIK, SOBERAN BADAUKAK!

source: HUH? WHAT'S GOING ON? @WHAT'S WITH ALL THIS OMINOUS DARKNESS?
target: EH? ZER GERTATZEN DA? @NONDIK DATOR ILUNTASUN BELDURGARRI HAU?

source: IT WAS TIME#TO CONFER WITH#{160} MOONBEARD!

YEP, IT'S HUMGRUMP ALRIGHT. ALWAYS UP TO TREACHEROUS TRICKERY, THAT ONE. @THERE'S SOMETHING RATHER ODD ABOUT THE MAGIC HE USED... @AND... THIS IS NOT USUALLY HOW THE STORY GOES, YOU KNOW... @THAT IS TO SAY... URMM... @... @FORGET ABOUT THAT. HARRUMPH! @THIS IS A JOB FOR THE PLUCKY SQUIRE, JOT! @HUMGRUMP IS AT TOME TOWER... @HEAD THERE AND MAKE SURE THAT CREEPY LITTLE TWERP DOESN'T CAUSE ANY MORE BOTHER!
target: BAIBA, PETRALTZAR IZAN DA. BETI BADARABIL MALTZURKERIAREN BAT HORREK. @ERABILI DUEN MAGIAN BADAGO BITXIA DEN ZERBAIT... @ETA... HAU EZ DA ISTORIOA GARATZEKO OHIKO MODUA, BADAKIZU... @HAU DA... ERMM... @... @AHAZTU ESANDAKOA. PETRALTZAR! @HAU JOTENTZAKO LANA DA, EZKUTARI AUSARTA! @PETRALTZAR LIBURUKI DORREAN DAGO... @ZOAZ HARANTZ ETA ZIURTATU KAIKU HORREK EZ DUELA ARAZO GEHIAGO SORTUKO!

source: THAT WEASELLY WIZARD IS AT TOME TOWER. YOU KIDS HEAD OVER THERE, AND JOT... @PUT A STOP TO HUMGRUMP'S MALARKEY! @I'LL LOOK INTO THAT STRANGE GREEN MAGIC... @AND HAVE A DONUT. BUT THAT'S BY THE BY. @LATER!
target: AZTI MALTZUR HORI LIBURUKI DORREAN DAGO. ZOAZTE HARUNTZ GAZTETXOOK, ETA JOT... @GELDI EZAZU PETRALTZARREN GAIZTAKERIA! @NIK MAGIA BERDE BITXI HORI AZTERTUKO DUT... @ETA DONUT BAT JANGO DUT. BAINA HORI EZ DA KONTUA. @AIO!

source: GOODBYE AND GOOD LUCK! @ ALTHOUGH... YOU NEVER REALLY NEED IT, JOT!
target: AGUR ETA ZORTE ON! @ HALA ERE... BENETAN EZ DUZU HORRELAKORIK BEHAR, JOT!

source: HEY JOT! WE'VE GOT ANOTHER HUMGRUMP SITUATION, HUH? @MOONBEARD GAVE ME THE SKINNY!
target: AIZU JOT! BERRIZ ARI DA PETRALTZAR BERE KONTUEKIN, EZTA? @BIZARGIK KONTATU DIT!

source: NO LIE... I'M PUMPED THAT I'M GOING TO GET TO SEE THE PLUCKY SQUIRE IN ACTION... @{150}KAPOW!{100} @LEAD THE WAY, JOT!
target: EGIA ESANGO DIZUT... EZKUTARI AUSARTA LANEAN IKUSTEAKO DESIRATZEN NAGO... @{150}BAM!{100} @AURRERA, JOT!

source: JOT FELT AN URGENT NEED TO GET GOING TO TOME TOWER!
target: JOTEK LIBURUKI DORRERA JOATEKO BAPATEKO BEHARRA SENTITU ZUEN!

source: NICE! YOU ALWAYS HAVE A WAY WITH WORDS, JOT!
target:
EDERKI! BETI IZAN ZARA TREBEA HITZEKIN, JOT!

source: JOT CAN NOW HIT MULTIPLE ENEMIES WITH A SINGLE SWORD THROW
JOT WILL NOW SPIN TWICE AFTER CHARGING UP A SPIN
FURTHER INCREASE THE POWER OF JOT'S SWORD. GOOD FOR ALL SWORD ATTACKS
JOT CAN NOW THROW HIS SWORD FURTHER THAN BEFORE
JOT WILL NOW SPIN THREE TIMES AFTER CHARGING UP A SPIN
INCREASE JOT'S SWORD TO MAXIMUM POWER! GOOD FOR ALL SWORD ATTACKS
JOT CAN NOW RECALL HIS THROWN SWORD INSTANTLY
JOT WILL NOW SPIN AN INCREDIBLE FOUR TIMES AFTER CHARGING UP A SPIN
ALL BULBS COLLECTED ARE WORTH DOUBLE!
A BUBBLE WILL PROTECT JOT FROM THE NEXT HIT... AND DEAL DAMAGE TO THAT ENEMY!
THE SWORD THROW WILL DEAL DOUBLE DAMAGE!
A SWORD THROW WILL NOW ATTRACT ITEMS FROM A DISTANCE!
ITEMS WILL BE DRAWN TO JOT FROM A DISTANCE! GOOD FOR LAZY COLLECTORS
RECEIVE A SPECIAL ITEM THAT MAY OR MAY NOT BE CURRENTLY AVAILABLE IN THE SHOP!
A COLLECTABLE ART SCROLL THAT CAN'T BE FOUND IN THE LANDS OF MOJO!
target: ARTE PERGAMINO KOLEKZIONAGARRIA, EZIN DA MOJOKO LURRETAN AURKITU!

source: GREETINGS, BRAVE WARRIORS! @MY NAME'S MARTINA... NICE TO MEET YOU! @YOU ADVENTURERS CUT DOWN FEARSOME ENEMIES... AND I SLASH PRICES. @LET ME SHOW YOU WHAT I HAVE FOR SALE!
target: ONGI ETORRI, GERLARI ADORETSUAK! @NI MARTINA NAIZ... URTE ASKOTARAKO! @ABENTURAZALEEK GAIKILE BELDURGARRIAK TXIKITZEN DITUZUE... ETA NIK PREZIOAK. @ZATOZTE SALGAI DUDANA IKUSTERA!

source: IT WAS LOVELY TO MAKE YOUR ACQUAINTANCE! @BE SURE TO CHECK IN AGAIN... NEXT TIME WE MEET I'LL HAVE NEW STOCK! @YOU KEEP SAVING THE LAND FROM BAD BUSINESS, AND MY BUSINESS WILL SAVE YOU FROM BAD DEALS. @SO LONG, BRAVE WARRIORS!
target: PLAZERA IZAN DA ZUEK EZAGUTZEA! @PASA BERRIZ NAHI DUZUENEAN... HURRENGORAKO GAUZA GEHIAGO IZANGO DITUT! @ZUEK JARRAITU LURRALDE HAU GAUZA TXARRETATIK SALBATZEN, ETA NIK AKORDIO TXARRETATIK SALBATUKO ZAITUZTET. @HURRENGORA ARTE, GERLARI ADORETSUAK!

source: WE MEET AGAIN! @CARE TO TAKE A LOOK AT MY CURRENT SELECTION?
target: BERRIRO AURKITU GARA! @NIRE AUKERAKETA IKUSI NAHI DUZUE?

source: WELL IF IT ISN'T THE BRAVE WARRIORS WITH A SHARP EYE FOR GOOD DEALS! @I'VE GOT SOME NEW STUFF IN. TAKE A LOOK!
GOOD NEWS, FRIENDS! @I NEED TO MAKE ROOM FOR NEW STOCK, SO YOU CAN HAVE THIS FOR FREE.
FRIENDS, YOU'D REALLY BE HELPING ME OUT IF YOU TAKE THIS OFF MY HANDS. @COME, TAKE THIS WITH YOU. FREE OF CHARGE!
WELL, THERE IT IS. THAT MYSTERIOUS ANCIENT OWL. @ALL THE KNOWLEDGE OF MOJO IS SUPPOSED TO BE STORED IN THERE, Y'KNOW...
target: TIRA, HOR DAGO. ANTZINAKO HONTZ MISTERIOTSU HORI. @MOJOKO JAKINTZA GUZTIA BERTAN DAGOELA USTE DA, BA'KIZU...

source: WHOAH! @NOT SURE THE GROUND SHOULD BE DOING THIS...
target: UOOO! @LURZORUAK EZ LUKE HORI EGIN BEHAR...

source: Although the broad design of Jot was decided early on, alternative hero designs were explored during pre-production.
Testing how an alternative hero design would look in the top-down environments. Conclusion: too visually complex, and not quite as charming. Sorry fella.
A graphical glitch in the boxing minigame created our friend the Glitchbird. A character created by the game itself. Thank you, game.
target: Boxeo minijokoko hautsitako grafiko batetik sortu zen gure lagun Heghautsia. Jokoak berak sortutako pertsonaia bat. Eskerrik asko, joko.

source: A lineup of the characters that appear in the gameplay section we call 'Dinorama'.
Some early concepting of game environments. This would eventually become Boogie Beach.
Some early concepting of game environments. This would eventually become the dino land Jot adventures through on the desk.
Some early concepting of game environments. Looks delicious.
Some early concepting of game environments. This would eventually become Artia Town.
Some early concepting of game environments. This would eventually become Artia Castle.
Some early concepting of game environments. An enchanted place.
Some early concepting of game environments. Spooky.
Some early concepting of game environments. This would eventually become Deepdoom.
Some early concepting of game environments. This would eventually become the green lands in the early chapters of the game.
Some early concepting of game environments. Lots of skeletons skull-king around.
Some early concepting of game environments. Appealing to the 80s / 90s kid who grew up with slime toys and TV shows.
Some early concepting of game environments. The hot spring looks quite inviting, don't you think?
Some early concepting of game environments. This would eventually become the Sonnet Swamps.
Some early concepting of game environments. All these environment concepts were drawn by Dave Hankin.
Some early concepting of game environments. This would eventually become Moonbeard's lab.
We knew we wanted to feature a boxing minigame... but it took a while to land on exactly who your opponent would be. As it turns out, it wouldn't be a giant muscular duck.
Exploring the look of Jot on the desk. Early on he was actually cel-shaded, but he just looked better more realistically shaded.
Early character design. This was before Jot was a writer, and didn't have a quill in his hat. He already has that plucky disposition, though.
Early character design. Moonbeard before his sunglasses.
Early character design. Pip was originally a trickster kind of character who turned out to be evil. The Pip now featured in the game is all good. We think.
Early character design. Thrash was always athletic, but started out as a human character before becoming a mountain troll.
Early character design. At one point Violet was a rabbit.
Early character design. Humgrump's look came together fairly early on, and didn't change much.
An idea for a whack-a-mole style minigame. These guys look like they'd whack you right back.
A concept piece of Jot emerging from the book. For a while he was drawn with a cat companion, but eventually Pip took on the companion role. The cat was pipped by a mouse.
An exploration of the look of the room. This was useful reference for the 3D artists. The art was drawn by Murilo Cavalcanti.
An exploration of the mood of the desk when Jot is first kicked out of his storybook.
An intro page for a shooting minigame idea. We always wanted Jot to become super-buff when the situation called for it. There's no real logic to it, it just seemed like a funny idea.
Sometimes it's useful just to draw a whole load of enemies without too much thought as to how they'll be used. You can pick the ones you like afterwards.
The little pig enemy here would eventually become the Rubboink character found in Artia.
I like Business Bear here. Shame we didn't find a spot for him in this game. Maybe one day his time will come.
This was sketched soon after the idea of The Plucky Squire was formed. It features a very early design of our hero, Jot.
Initial sketch of top-down gameplay. Narration text appearing in the environment was a planned feature since the earliest days.
Sketching the look of simple full-page minigames.
Sketching how top-down character interactions might look, featuring an early Moonbeard design.
First explorations of the key art for the game. This feels more like teaser art than key art. This art features the working title of the project.
Key art rough layout featuring an early logo design.
The final key art. The art is made up of a combination of 3D renders and digitally-painted elements.
The image for this shooting minigame was a saturday morning sci-fi cartoon. We call this gameplay section 'Resotub'.
Jot has ink stains on his writing hand.
Thrash has callouses on his fingers from drumming and on the soles of his feet from... walking around barefoot.

At first the interactive domino objects in our game were just normal dominoes. We realised it would make life much easier if they could only fall one-way, however, and so the one-way domino object was born.
Explorations in the presentation of story sequences. At first they were more comic-like in their layout - formatted in square panels - but eventually became more picturebook-esque.
HEY UP. @TIME TO TRY OUT THE JUMP ATTACK, JOT.
HOW DO. @TIME TO TRY OUT THE SPIN ATTACK, JOT.
WELL NOW. @TIME TO PRACTISE THROWING YOUR SWORD, JOT.
ALRIGHT THERE. @BACK FOR SOME MORE TRAINING?#USE THE BOARD TO CHOOSE WHAT TO PRACTISE.
GOOD GOING. @IF YOU WANT TO KEEP TRAINING, CHECK OUT THE BOARD. @OTHERWISE, LEAVE VIA THE EXIT AT THE BOTTOM OF THE PAGE.
JUMP WITH {Action_Jump} AND PRESS {Action_Attack} WHILE AIRBORNE TO SLAM DOWN
HOLD AND RELEASE {Action_Stamp} TO DO A SPIN ATTACK
PRESS {Action_Aim} TO THROW YOUR SWORD, AND AGAIN TO RETRIEVE IT
target: SAKATU {Action_Aim} ZURE EZPATA BOTATZEKO, ETA BERRIZ BUELTAN EKARTZEKO

source: THAT WON'T WORK RIGHT NOW, JOT!#TRY A JUMP ATTACK.
THAT WON'T WORK RIGHT NOW, JOT!#HIT THEM WITH THE SPIN ATTACK.
THAT WON'T WORK RIGHT NOW, JOT!#THROW YOUR SWORD AT THEM.
YOU FOUND A LOST GLITCHBIRD! @IT WILL RETURN TO ITS HOMELAND.
target: GALDUTAKO HEGHAUTSI BAT BAT AURKITU DUZU! @BERE SORTERRIRA ITZULIKO DA.

source: YOU FOUND A SECOND LOST GLITCHBIRD! @IT WILL RETURN TO ITS HOME WITH JOY IN ITS LITTLE HEART.
target: GALDUTAKO BIGARREN HEGHAUTSIA AURKITU DUZU! @BIHOTZ TXIKIA ZORIONEZ BETETA DUELA ITZULIKO DA BERE ETXERA.

source: YOU FOUND A THIRD LOST GLITCHBIRD! @YOU ARE REALLY GOOD AT FINDING GLITCHBIRDS.
target: GALDUTAKO HIRUGARREN HEGHAUTSIA AURKITU DUZU! @BENETAN ONA ZARA HEGHAUTSIAK AURKITZEN.

source: YOU FOUND A FOURTH LOST GLITCHBIRD! @GLITCHBIRDS ARE HIGHLY CURIOUS CREATURES, BUT, ALAS, NOT INCREDIBLY PERCEPTIVE. @THIS OFTEN LEADS TO THEM BECOMING CONFUSED AND LOST. @AFTER A WHILE THEY BECOME QUITE LONELY, AND LONG TO RETURN TO THEIR HOMELAND. @GOOD JOB FINDING THIS ONE.
target: GALDUTAKO LAUGARREN HEGHAUTSIA AURKITU DUZU! @HEGHAUTSIAK OSO IZAKI KUXKUXEROAK DIRA, BAINA, EZ BEREZIKI ARGIAK. @HORREGATIK ASKOTAN NAHASI ETA GALDU EGITEN DIRA. @AZKENERAKO BAKARRIK GELDITZEN DIRA, ETA SORTERRITIK URRUN. @LAN ITZELA HAU AURKITZEN.

source: YOU FOUND A FIFTH LOST GLITCHBIRD! @WHEN YOU FEEL THAT YOU ARE LOST, WITH NO WAY OUT IN SIGHT... @PLEASE BE BRAVE, AND HAVE HOPE. @THERE IS ALWAYS A WAY BACK TO THE LIGHT. @AND THANK YOU FOR RESCUING THIS GLITCHBIRD. THERE ARE STILL A FEW MORE TO FIND!
target: GALDUTAKO BOSGARREN HEGHAUTSIA AURKITU DUZU! @GALDUTA ZAUDELA SENTITZEN DUZUNEAN, ARGITASUNETIK URRUN... @MESEDEZ IZAN ADOREA, ETA IZAN ITXAROPENA. @BETI DAGO ARGITASUNEA ITZULTZEKO BIDEA. @ETA ESKERRIK ASKO HEGHAUTSI HAU SALBATZEAGATIK. ORAINDIK BADAUDES AURKITZEKO BATZUK GEHIAGO!

source: YOU FOUND A SIXTH LOST GLITCHBIRD! @TO THE UNTRAINED EYE, GLITCHBIRDS LOOK SIMILAR TO EACH OTHER. @HOWEVER, EACH ONE IS QUITE UNIQUE. @FOR EXAMPLE, IN ITS HOMELAND THE GLITCHBIRD YOU JUST RESCUED IS A CHARTERED SURVEYOR.
target: GALDUTAKO SEIGARREN HEGHAUTSIA AURKITU DUZU! @ENTRENATU GABEKO BEGIARENTZAT, HEGHAUTSI GUZTIAK BERDINAK DIRA. @HALA ERE, BAKOITZA BEREZIA DA. @ADIBIDEZ, SALBATU BERRI DUZUNA BERE SORTERRIAN BIDE-INGENIARIA ZEN.

source: YOU FOUND A SEVENTH LOST GLITCHBIRD! @THAT GLITCHBIRD WAS ACTUALLY A HIGHLY RESPECTED PIANIST IN ITS HOMELAND. @YOU WERE IN THE PRESENCE OF A CELEBRITY AND YOU DIDN'T REALISE IT. @PERHAPS IT WILL WRITE A SONG ABOUT THE KIND SQUIRE WHO RESCUED IT.
target: GALDUTAKO ZAZPIGARREN HEGHAUTSIA AURKITU DUZU! @HEGHAUTSI HAU ITZAL HANDIKO PIANO-JOTZAILEA DA BERE SORTERRIAN. @IZAKI OSPETSU BAT IZAN DUZU ZUREKIN ETA EZ ZARA OHARTU ERE EGIN. @BEHARBADA SALBATU ZUEN EZKUTARIARI BURUZKO ABESTI BAT EGINGO DU.

source: YOU FOUND AN EIGHTH LOST GLITCHBIRD! @YOU'RE GETTING CLOSE TO RESCUING ALL THE LOST GLITCHBIRDS! @CRACKING JOB SO FAR!
target: GALDUTAKO ZORTZIGARREN HEGHAUTSIA AURKITU DUZU! @HEGHAUTSI GUZTIAK SALBATZETIK OSO GERTU ZAUDE! @IZUGARRIZKO LANA!

source: YOU FOUND A NINTH LOST GLITCHBIRD! @THERE'S ONLY ONE LEFT TO FIND! @NOW WHERE COULD IT BE?
target: GALDUTAKO BEDERATZIGARREN HEGHAUTSIA AURKITU DUZU! @BAT BAKARRIK GELDITZEN ZAIZU! @NON EGON LITEKE?

source: YOU FOUND THE TENTH AND FINAL LOST GLITCHBIRD! @ALL THE GLITCHBIRDS ARE NOW BACK IN THEIR HOMELAND. @WORD IS THAT THEY'RE PLANNING TO THROW A PARTY IN YOUR HONOUR. @IT'S SAID THAT THOSE WHO DO GOOD DEEDS FOR GLITCHBIRDS WILL EXPERIENCE GOOD FORTUNE. @THANK YOU FOR RESCUING THEM ALL, AND MAY FORTUNE SMILE UPON YOU.
target: GALDUTAKO HAMARGARREN ETA AZKEN HEGHAUTSIA AURKITU DUZU! @HEGHAUTSI GUZTIAK BERAIEN SORTERRIETAN DAUDE HONEZKERO. @TXUTXUMUTXUEK DIOTE ZURE OHOREZKO FESTA BAT EGINGO DUTELA. @DIOTENEZ, HEGHAUTSIEI LAGUNTZEN DIENEK ZORTE ONA IZATEN OMEN DUTE. @ESKERRIK ASKO GUZTIAK SALBATZEAGATIK, ZORTE ONA IZAN DEZAZULA.

source: HERE, A PORTAL TO HELP YOU ON YOUR WAY...

GOOD GOING, YOUNG SQUIRE! @I BELIEVE THAT THE ITEM THAT CAN HELP YOU GET BACK TO YOUR WORLD IS FURTHER AHEAD. @BUT, LISTEN, ON YOUR WAY YOU MAY RUN INTO CREEPY CRAWLY COLEOPTERA... @BEETLES! SAM LIKES TO KEEP THEM AS PETS, YOU SEE... @BEWARE, JOT! DON'T GET EATEN! @IT SIMPLY WOULDN'T DO...

source: Let's stop all this fighting business'
I'm on a quest to defeat him!'
I'm trying to stop his nefarious plans.'
'Now is not the time for words...but for battle!'
'I will not talk with you...but my arrows will sing!'
'It seems that you really wish to talk! I do not!'
'You shall not have this bow...but you shall have its fury!'
'How do you like the points of these arrows, scoundrel?'
'I see panic in your beady eyes!'
'No doubt you rue entangling with a forest elf!'
'The feather in your cap quivers with fear, scoundrel!'
'You will not soon forget the song of my arrows!'
'You're a little hardier, it seems...but fall to my arrows, you shall!'
'I have been too kind thus far!'
'Still no match for me, crimson rascal!'
'Our forests will be happier with you gone!'
'You don't give up, do you, rapscallion?'
'You will never defeat the elvish spirit!'
'You will not succeed with your nefarious plans!'
'Jot! It is I, Page the Bookworm!'
'You seem to be in a desperate predicament!'
'Your vitality is restored! I may have also...spruced up your offensive capabilities...'
'Alas, Jot, that was a one-time spell; I can revitalise you no more.'
'The outcome of this skirmish is now entirely up to you, Plucky Squire!'
'This sorcery matters naught...I shall dispatch you once and for all!'
'I will destroy this elven bow before I give it to you!'
'The elves will never let their weapons be used for evil purposes.'
'You can tell that to your boss...what was his name now?'
'It seems that she has erroneously identified you as an agent of Humgrump's'
'You must talk to her, Jot - inform her of the truth!'
'I think I can reproduce the spell that she cast to buy us some time...'
'Jot is a champion of his land...'
'...striving to defeat the dastardly Humgrump and put a stop to his mischief!'
'Alowynia, we wholeheartedly apologize for the disturbance we have precipitated.'
'We are searching for a weapon to help clean up Humgrump's chaos.'
'Your elven bow...seemed like it could be advantageous in that regard...'
'But we did not mean to cause any turmoil in your forests.'
'Is that so? Now that I take a closer look at him...'
'...he does seem to have a somewhat heroic countenance...'
'I have decided...I shall lend the elven bow to you!'
'Any enemy of Humgrump is a friend of mine.'
'I can see the aura of good about you now, Jot!'
'When the bow has finished assisting you it will return itself to these forests.'
'Good luck on your quest, young Jot!'
'Oh sacred forests! I have fallen to the sword of this intruder!'
'But...I take the elven bow with me!'
'And the bow...it is gone with her...'
'When the bow has finished assisting you it will return itself to these forests.'
'Good luck on your quest, young Jot!'
'Another intruder! I can see a thieving gleam in your eye...'
Alowynia cast a Spell Of Protection.
##Her Defense Power rose. Her Attack Power fell.
Page cast a Spell Of Protection.
##Jot's Defense Power rose. His Attack Power fell.
The mighty ranger awaits her next foe...

NOW... I'VE SAID WHAT I NEEDED TO SAY, I'VE SEEN WHAT I WANTED TO SEE... @I MUST BE GOING! @UNTIL WE MEET AGAIN, PLUCKY SQUIRE...
JOT DUDE... THERE YOU ARE! WE CAME TO FIND YOU...
AND TO TAKE A BREATHER FROM THE PARTY. IF WE'RE BEING HONEST...
SO MANY PEOPLE WANT TO TALK TO US... @HELLO... NICE TO MEET YOU... HELLO THERE... HI... PHEW!!!
I THINK I MIGHT HAVE DEVELOPED A VACANT STARE...
IT'S PRETTY COOL THOUGH... ALL THE NICE THINGS PEOPLE ARE SAYING ABOUT US.
KIND OF UNBELIEVABLE... MAKING US SOUND LIKE WE'RE... HEROIC WARRIORS OR SOMETHING!
WELL... Y'KNOW... WE DID SORT OF... SAVE THE LAND. PRETTY MAJOR DEAL!
NO LIE. QUITE THE THING, REALLY...
WHOAH, THEY BROKE OUT THE FIREWORKS!
HEY, JOT... I WANTED TO ASK... @YOU'RE GOING TO BE WRITING THIS WHOLE ADVENTURE UP IN A NEW BOOK, RIGHT?
YOU HAVE TO! @I MEAN... IT'S ONE GNARLY STORY...!
OOH, MAKE SURE I LOOK REALLY COOL, OK! @MAYBE LEAVE OUT THE PART WHERE WE'RE BEING ATTACKED BY POISONOUS SNAKES... @MY MUM WOULD FREAK OUT...
THE TITLE! WHAT'S THE TITLE GOING TO BE?
HEY, WAIT A MINUTE... IS SOMEONE WATCHING MINIBEARD? @YOU KNOW HOW HE GETS AROUND FIREWORKS...
COME ON DUDES, LET'S GET BACK TO THE FUN!
I'VE ALSO COME TO GIVE YOU A MESSAGE FROM THE AUTHOR OF MY BOOKS. @HE WANTED TO LET YOU KNOW... @THAT YOU, VIOLET, THRASH, PIP... MOONBEARD... HAVE ALL BEEN A GREAT INSPIRATION TO HIM.
HEY, LATCH!#JUST HANGIN' HERE AS A TEST. @HAVE YOU CHANGED YOUR HAIR? IT BOILS QUITE NICELY NOW! @UGH, PRESS THE B BUTTON TO SHUT ME UP.
